candidate_lesson.lesson_text: A SHORT with 4 of 6 signal layers FAILING (✗ HTF bias against macro, ✗ no OB/FVG zone entry, ✗ no CHOCH/BOS structure shift) should be vetoed regardless of a strong rate_diff_z — the single confirmed liquidity sweep + FVG presence is not enough confluence to override structural disagreement.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: When market_structure is BULLISH but macro says SHORT, entering short on a swept BSL means fading institutional order flow at the exact point institutions accumulate — the sweep is stop-hunt liquidity being COLLECTED to fuel continuation UP, not reversal down. Without a CHOCH/BOS confirming the reversal, the sweep is a trap on the trader shorting it.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if direction contradicts market_structure_bias AND no CHOCH/BOS in trade direction AND not price_at_OB_or_FVG_zone: veto trade regardless of rate_diff_z magnitude
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Cuts counter-structure SHORT losses; improves Sharpe by removing -1.0R trades that had macro conviction but zero structural confirmation. Estimated +0.02-0.04 Sharpe by eliminating the most negatively-skewed loss cluster.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: The single closed trade (USDJPY SHORT, -1.002R) had 4/6 signal layers FAILING — only the BSL sweep and Asia killzone passed. Strong rate_diff_z=-0.968 did not compensate for structural contradiction.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: The lone loss had why_this_trade explicitly listing '✗ HTF bias: market structure BULLISH vs macro SHORT', '✗ Price not at OB or FVG zone', and '✗ No structure shift (CHOCH/BOS) in trade direction' — 3 hard structural failures. rate_differential_zscore=-0.968 was strong but the trade still lost full -1R, confirming macro strength cannot rescue counter-structure entries with no CHOCH/BOS.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in the last 7 days with only 1 lifetime closed loss — the system is effectively in a data-starvation state (RQ-006 blocked until 30+ trades), so all lessons remain hypotheses pending sample accumulation rather than validated edges.
